Objective.shortTerm: Seeking to leverage C++ and Python proficiency to contribute to robust backend systems and secure a full-time position in software development
Objective.longTerm: Further expanding on professional skills and acquiring new technologies to bring more value to the company

WorkingExp.title: Administrative Collaborator
description: Streamlined administrative office tasks and managed data entry operations with high accuracy.
Maintained and updated resident information databases and processed official documentation.
Coordinated logistics and provided front-desk support for incoming students and visitors.

WorkingExp.title: Prompt Engineering & AI Evaluator
description: Design complex prompts tailored to specific project goals and logical constraints.
Evaluate AI model responses for technical accuracy, clarity, and strict adherence to instructions.
Apply domain expertise in Mathematics and Programming to debug AI logic and identify subtle hallucinations.

Projects.title: C-Base Multi-Client Data Transfer System
contribution: Implemented cross-platform socket handling for Windows and Linux OS.
Designed custom application-layer protocols for reliable text and file transmission.
Developed a connection-limiting feature per IP address to prevent basic DoS attacks.
Projects.deliverables: A robust server-client architecture capable of handling concurrent connections and secure file transfers.

Projects.title: APT Cyber Kill Chain Penetration Tool
contribution: Conducted theoretical research on APT attack vectors and the Cyber Kill Chain framework.
Integrated and automated sub-tools including Spiderfoot, Metasploit, and Sliver.
Developed Bash scripts to automate vulnerability scanning and reporting.
Projects.deliverables: An automated tool simulating phishing-based APT attacks to test organizational defensive capabilities.

Projects.title: RSA File Encryption/Decryption Tool
contribution: Architected custom large-integer handling classes to support high-precision RSA calculations.
Developed an interactive command-line interface for seamless user interaction and key management.
Projects.deliverables: A functional C++ application capable of generating RSA key pairs and performing secure file encryption and decryption.

Projects.title: Blockchain Protocol Implementation
contribution: Developed core transaction verification logic and cryptographic validation protocols.
Designed a robust command-line console for real-time user interaction with the blockchain.
Projects.deliverables: A Go-based blockchain simulation featuring transaction pooling, block validation, and ledger integrity checks.

Projects.title: Customizable Personal CV Builder
contribution: Designed a responsive React-based UI with dynamic light and dark mode themes.
Engineered client-side PDF generation logic allowing users to export tailored resumes.
Implemented selective data filtering to allow users to toggle specific work experiences and projects.

Projects.title: Full-Stack Search Engine integration
contribution: Architected the frontend and integrated SerpAPI to fetch and display organic search results.
Developed a Node.js/Express backend to handle API requests and secure sensitive keys.
Authored automated unit and integration tests using Jest and Supertest to ensure API reliability.
Projects.deliverables: A web platform that integrates external search APIs with high performance and tested server-side logic.

Projects.title: NLP-Powered Grammar Syntax Analyzer
contribution: Designed a React-based interface for visualizing complex linguistic syntax trees.
Integrated the SpaCy NLP library to parse and categorize structured grammar elements.
Deployed a multi-service architecture using Firebase for the frontend and Render for the NLP backend.
Projects.deliverables: A live NLP tool (syntax-analyzer-24163.web.app) that decomposes sentences into their grammatical components.
